  <entry>
    <id>tag:status.claude.com,2005:Incident/30964135</id>
    <published>2026-07-24T15:36:54Z</published>
    <updated>2026-07-24T15:36:54Z</updated>
    <link rel="alternate" type="text/html" href="https://status.claude.com/incidents/yc7mr2gvl914"/>
    <title>Microsoft Office add-in availability</title>
    <content type="html"><p> <small>Jul <var data-var='date'>24</var>, <var data-var='time'>15:36</var> UTC</small><br> <strong>Resolved</strong> - This issue has been resolved. </p> <p> <small>Jul <var data-var='date'>22</var>, <var data-var='time'>17:56</var> UTC</small><br> <strong>Identified</strong> - Users who installed the following add-ins may experience issues accessing the add-in functionality: Claude by Anthropic for PowerPoint, Claude by Anthropic for Word, and Claude by Anthropic for Excel. <br /><br />To regain immediate access to Claude for Microsoft 365, install the add-in here: https://marketplace.microsoft.com/en-us/product/office/wa200010725 </p></content>
  </entry>

    <title>Elevated error rate on Opus 4.8</title>
    <content type="html"><p> <small>Jul <var data-var='date'>24</var>, <var data-var='time'>10:22</var> UTC</small><br> <strong>Resolved</strong> - This incident has been resolved. </p> <p> <small>Jul <var data-var='date'>24</var>, <var data-var='time'>09:35</var> UTC</small><br> <strong>Monitoring</strong> - A fix has been implemented and we are monitoring the results. </p> <p> <small>Jul <var data-var='date'>24</var>, <var data-var='time'>09:09</var> UTC</small><br> <strong>Investigating</strong> - We are currently investigating this issue. </p></content>
  </entry>
